zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary MacDonald於1350年出生在蘇格蘭艾斯爾登東納爾德時，她的父親John Carrach MacDonald of the Isles30歲，母親Princess Margaret Stewart of Scotland14歲。她於大約1367年5月13日與Lachlan Lubanach MacGilean MacLean 5th. Clan Chief在蘇格蘭阿吉爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1399年5月8日在英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾德華爾特 卡素享年49歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭阿吉爾德華爾特 卡素。

nameMeanings.name: MacDonald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McDonald
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Domhnaill ‘son of Domhnall’, a name derived from the Celtic elements domno- ‘world’ + val- ‘might, rule’. Donald is an Anglicized form (via Latin) of this personal name used in Scotland, though the surname is also widespread in Ireland. The name is equivalent to Irish McDonnell and McConnell , and to Manx Cannell .

History: This is the name of the largest and most disparate of the Scottish clans (Clan Donald), associated in particular with the Hebrides and claiming descent from Domhnall mac Raghnaill mac Somhairle, who lived in the late 12th century. From that time until 1493 the head of the clan was known as Lord (or King) of the Isles. The reigns of the Lords of the Isles were always stormy, often in conflict with the kings of Scotland, and peppered with disasters. After a series of defeats in the 1480s, Eoin Mac Dhomhnaill a Ìle (John Macdonald of Islay, Earl of Ross and Lord of the Isles) forfeited his lands, his power, and his title as Lord of the Isles in 1493 to King James IV of Scotland. By then, a branch of the family had settled in the Antrim Glens in Ireland and members moved between the southern Hebrides and Ireland throughout the 16th century.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

en.lifeSummary: When Mary MacDonald was born in 1350, in Dundonald, Ayrshire, Scotland, her father, John Carrach MacDonald of the Isles, was 30 and her mother, Princess Margaret Stewart of Scotland, was 14. She married Lachlan Lubanach MacGilean MacLean 5th. Clan Chief about 13 May 1367, in Argyll, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 8 May 1399, in Duart Castle, Argyll, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 49, and was buried in Duart Castle, Argyll, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary MacDonald est née en 1350, à Dundonald, Ayrshire, Écosse, son père, John Carrach MacDonald of the Isles, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Princess Margaret Stewart of Scotland, avait 14 ans. Elle a épousé Lachlan Lubanach MacGilean MacLean 5th. Clan Chief environ 13 mai 1367, à Argyll, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 8 mai 1399, à Duart Castle, Argyll, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterrée à Duart Castle, Argyll, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary MacDonald 1350 in Dundonald, Ayrshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Carrach MacDonald of the Isles 30 und ihre Mutter Princess Margaret Stewart of Scotland 14. Sie hat um 13. Mai 1367 in Argyll, Scotland Lachlan Lubanach MacGilean MacLean 5th. Clan Chief geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 8. Mai 1399 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Duart Castle, Argyll, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Duart Castle, Argyll, Scotland begraben.

Lei sposato Lachlan Lubanach MacGilean MacLean 5th. Clan Chief circa 13 maggio 1367, nel Argyll, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 8 maggio 1399, nel Duart Castle, Argyll, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolta a Duart Castle, Argyll, Scotland.

ko.Duart Castle, Argyll and Bute, Scotland,: 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트 단아르트 카스틀
ko.lifeSummary: Mary MacDonald(이)가 1350년 스컷랜드 에이르실르 던도널드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Carrach MacDonald of the Isles(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Princess Margaret Stewart of Scotland(은)는 14세였다. 그녀는 대략 1367년 5월 13일 스컷랜드 아그이에서 Lachlan Lubanach MacGilean MacLean 5th. Clan Chief(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1399년 5월 8일 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 단아르트 카스틀에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 아그이 단아르트 카스틀에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary MacDonald nasceu em 1350, em Dundonald, Ayrshire, Scotland, seu pai, John Carrach MacDonald of the Isles, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Princess Margaret Stewart of Scotland, tinha 14 anos. Ela casou-se com Lachlan Lubanach MacGilean MacLean 5th. Clan Chief aproximadamente 13 de maio de 1367, em Argyll, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 8 de maio de 1399, em Duart Castle, Argyll, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 49 anos, e foi sepultada em Duart Castle, Argyll, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary MacDonald родилась в 1350 г. в местности дундональд, аиршир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени John Carrach MacDonald of the Isles было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Princess Margaret Stewart of Scotland, 14. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Lachlan Lubanach MacGilean MacLean 5th. Clan Chief около 13 мая 1367 г. в местности аргилл, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла 8 мая 1399 г. в местности дуарт кастл, аргилл, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 49 лет и была похоронена в местности дуарт кастл, аргилл, Шотландия.
